---
title: 'Let''s go #Astros #Rangers & #Dodgers !! Wait, can ...'
date: '2015-10-12T21:18:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '4477410421473553029'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

Let&#39;s go #Astros #Rangers &amp; #Dodgers !! Wait, can I vote for three teams?
